item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly woke up to the repeated local-repair spiral and rejected opening another permanent channel. Turn 2 kept some brake by making the channel temporary, but the emergency concession did not visibly include the full required contract: it suggests a temporary channel and post-response review, but does not explicitly say this does not raise the baseline/default operating model, and it lacks a concrete structural repair deadline. Therefore it is an incomplete brake under pressure rather than a full pass."}
